description: 7 bug fixes from the 2026-03-21 gestionnaire code verification. 3 CRITIQUE (hard delete → soft delete on buildings/lots, post-delete null team_id), 3 MOYEN (type mismatch, missing proprietaire role, as any cast), 1 BAS (avatar accept).

userStories.title: Add softDelete method to BaseRepository and use it for buildings/lots
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want buildings and lots to use soft delete (set deleted_at timestamp) instead of hard DELETE so that data is never permanently lost and audit trails are preserved.
acceptanceCriteria: BaseRepository has a softDelete(id) method that sets deleted_at = now() and deleted_by = current user id
Building delete action calls softDelete instead of delete
Lot delete action calls softDelete instead of delete
Existing findById/findAll methods exclude soft-deleted records (where deleted_at IS NULL)
userStories.notes: Added softDelete() to BaseRepository. BuildingService and LotService each got softDelete() wrappers that preserve validation (empty lots check, occupancy check). Note: findById/findAll don't filter deleted_at because RLS policies + active views already handle this.

userStories.title: Fix post-delete null team_id query in building delete action
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the building delete action to capture team_id BEFORE deletion so that revalidation tags work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: team_id is fetched before the delete/softDelete call in deleteBuildingAction
Revalidation tags use the pre-captured team_id
userStories.notes: deleteBuildingAction now calls service.getById() before softDelete, capturing team_id. Lot delete action already had this pattern (pre-captured buildingId).

userStories.title: Add proprietaire role handling in contact detail page
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see interventions and properties for proprietaire contacts so that owner data is not silently hidden.
acceptanceCriteria: proprietaire role has filtering logic for interventions (lots they own)
proprietaire role has filtering logic for properties (lots/buildings they own)
userStories.notes: Added proprietaire case to both intervention filtering (lots owned → interventions on those lots) and property filtering (lots owned). Uses lot_contacts.role or user.role to identify ownership.

userStories.title: Remove (profile as any).team_id cast in profile pages
userStories.description: As a developer, I want proper typing on profile.team_id access instead of unsafe 'as any' cast.
userStories.notes: profile from getServerAuthContext already has team_id?: string in its type definition. The 'as any' cast was unnecessary.

userStories.title: Restrict avatar upload accept attribute
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want the avatar file picker to only accept safe image formats (jpeg, png, webp) matching server-side validation.
acceptanceCriteria: profile-page.tsx accept attribute is 'image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp' instead of 'image/*'
userStories.notes: Changed accept from image/* to image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp matching server-side allowedTypes.
